registration.title: Leaders' Summit '26 Registration
registration.completeDesc: Your identity has been synchronized with the Leaders' Summit 2026 database. You are now part of the global network.

welcome.title: Application\nProtocol
welcome.desc: Ensure all identity credentials and promotional assets are prepared before initialization.

step1.label: SECTION 1 OF 4
step1.title: ESBS LEADERS' SUMMIT '26 - ATTENDING LEADERS
step1.p2: We are creating a brochure featuring all of the attending leaders to help the networking and collaboration between our attendees. Each leader will have their short bio and promotional materials for their ministries/events. We also kindly ask you to share a key testimony with us, as we would love to select a few leaders to share at the Leaders' Summit.
step1.nameNote: NOTE: THIS NAME WILL APPEAR ON YOUR BADGE.
step1.bioNote: NOTE: THIS INFO MIGHT BE EDITED/SHORTENED BY OUR TEAM IF NECESSARY.

step2.label: SECTION 2 OF 4
step2.title: MINISTRY INFORMATION
step2.consent: Please note the provided information will be made public to our attendees. If you do not consent, send an email to acsongedi@europeshallbesaved.org
step2.profileNote: This photo will help other leaders to recognize you after the event. Please only upload a photo of yourself. This photo will appear in the Leaders' Brochure.
step2.promoNote: If you would like to promote an event, initiative or your ministry, you are welcome to add it to this brochure.

step3.label: SECTION 3 OF 4
step3.title: HOW CAN OTHER ATTENDEES CONTACT YOU?
step3.publicNote: NOTE: This information will be public for the other attendees.
step3.privacyNote: Only provide the personal information you WANT others to receive.

step4.label: SECTION 4 OF 4
step4.title: TESTIMONIES
step4.testimonyNote: We would love to hear your testimony of what God has done through you and your ministry last year. We will ask a few leaders on Tuesday to share.
step4.eventsNote: If you have any events coming up with national or continental impact, please let us know the details!
